name: Nextdoor
description: Specs and technical requirements for Nextdoor member profiles, posts, business pages, and advertising.

items.name: Member Profile Photo
items.notes: Displayed as a circle in posts and comments; real photo encouraged per community guidelines

items.name: Business Page Logo
items.notes: Square logo shown on the Business Page and in local recommendations

items.name: Business Page Cover Photo
items.notes: Banner image shown at the top of the Business Page

items.name: Neighbourhood Post Image
items.notes: Up to 10 images per post; displayed in a grid in the feed

items.name: For Sale / Free Item Listing Photo
items.notes: Up to 8 photos per listing in the Nextdoor Classifieds section

items.name: Post Video
items.notes: H.264 video + AAC audio recommended; autoplay muted in feed

items.name: Neighbourhood Post
items.notes: First ~250 characters shown in the feed before 'See more'

items.name: Business Update Post
items.notes: Posts made from a Business Page to followers and the local area

items.name: Display Name
items.notes: First and last name visible to verified neighbours in the area

items.name: Local Deal Ad — Image
items.notes: Promoted local deals shown in the neighbourhood feed; managed via Nextdoor Ads

items.name: Sponsored Post — Body
items.notes: Ad copy for promoted posts shown in the community feed

items.name: Business Page Ad (Awareness)
items.notes: Awareness ads to grow Business Page followers in a defined neighbourhood radius
